body_txt: The stylized heart shape, ♡ (or <3, a.k.a. the "happy cyclops with a Playful Cat Smile " face, as an emoticon), is a classic visual metaphor. But, that's for the tropes in the Take These Tropes to Heart index. This page is for when the heart symbol appears and isn't part of any of those tropes. Something of note: According to Wikipedia , the exact origin of the ♡ symbol remains controversial , since it doesn't take a doctor to realize that it looks nothing like an actual human heart (and exactly what it's meant to look like is unclear); however, its existence as a stylized symbol seems to go back at least to medieval Europe, or maybe ancient Roman North Africa. Wicked Heart Symbol is a subtrope, for when the heart symbol is associated with villainy. Say It with Hearts is one as well, as is Heart of Happiness . The ♡ symbol is the only symbol that works with that trope. No anatomical hearts can be used for that, unless it's being played with.
